arts.ttl: Man City full list of FFP charges after huge Premier League points deduction update

arts.ttl: Former Manchester City captain and manager Tony Book dies aged 90
arts.sum: Right-back Book captained City as they won four major trophies.

arts.ttl: Player saying goodbye as he heads to Manchester City – Transfer agreed, documents being exchanged
arts.sum: Manchester City’s move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis is now in the ‘document exchange phase’. That’s according to journalist André Hernan, who reports that Reis is ‘already saying goodbye’ to his Palmeiras teammates. The journalist follows up earlier reports from today that Manchester City had finally struck a deal with Palmeiras for the highly rated The post Player saying goodbye as he heads to Manchester City – Transfer agreed, documents being exchanged appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Tony Book, Manchester City title winner and ‘club legend’, dies aged 90
arts.sum: Book won trophies as player and manager at City His other clubs as a defender included Plymouth The former Manchester City captain and manager Tony Book has died at the age of 90. Book, whose honours as a City player included a First Division title in 1968 and an FA Cup a year later, also played for clubs including Plymouth. City said in a statement: “It is with huge sadness and the heaviest of hearts that we announce the passing of former Manchester City captain and manager Tony Book, aged 90. A true club legend in every sense of the word, Tony made 315 appearances for City in total between 1966 and 1974, scoring five goals.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes worrying admission after rejecting proposal from Man City chiefs
arts.sum: Manchester City head coach Pep Guardiola has revealed that he told the club not to sign anyone last summer only to now regret that decision following lengthy injury crisis

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to sign £51m Martin Zubimendi from Real Sociedad, with deal virtually completed to beat Liverpool and Man City for summer transfer - and Mikel Arteta wants a forward next
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: The Real Sociedad star has been courted by Mikel Arteta for over 12 months and talks over a summer move are now at an advanced stage with sources indicating the deal is virtually completed.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man City ex-manager and club legend Tony Book dies aged 90 as tributes pour in
arts.sum: Manchester City have announced that Tony Book, their former player and manager who captained the side back in the 1970s, has died at the age of 90 in a club statement

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's wife Cristina was ‘drawn to the lure’ of other Premier League jobs
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola and his wife Cristina Serra have reportedly split after 30 years together, with the mother of his three children said to have been based in a different country for several years

arts.ttl: Man City kickstart rebuild as club agree £30m deal to sign Vitor Reis
arts.sum: Premier League champions also working on move to sign Abdukodir Khusanov

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's wife Cristina wanted him to prioritise two jobs prior to 'split'
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has reportedly split from his wife after 30 years together, with the couple having been based in two different countries for several years
